items.title: AWS Introduces S3 Files, Bringing File System Access to S3 Buckets
items.summaryShort: AWS Introduces S3 Files, Bringing File System Access to S3 Buckets. AWS recently introduced S3 Files, which lets users mount an Amazon S3 bucket and access its data through a standard file system interface.

items.title: Google Opens Gemma 4 Under Apache 2.0 with Multimodal and Agentic Capabilities
items.summaryShort: Google Opens Gemma 4 Under Apache 2.0 with Multimodal and Agentic Capabilities. Google has announced the release of Gemma 4, a series of open-weight AI models, including variants with 2B, 4B, 26B, and 31B parameters, under the Apache 2.0 li

items.title: Cloudflare Launches Code Mode MCP Server to Optimize Token Usage for AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Launches Code Mode MCP Server to Optimize Token Usage for AI Agents. Cloudflare has launched a new Model Context Protocol (MCP) server powered by Code Mode, enabling AI agents to interact with large APIs with minimal token usage.

items.title: Presentation: From VR to Flat Screens: Bridging the Input and Immersion Gap
items.summaryShort: Presentation: From VR to Flat Screens: Bridging the Input and Immersion Gap. Dany Lepage discusses the architectural journey of porting a hit VR title to seven non-VR platforms.

items.title: Platform as a Product: Delivering Value While Balancing Competing Priorities
items.summaryShort: Platform as a Product: Delivering Value While Balancing Competing Priorities. Software platforms must be treated as products.

items.title: New leaders, new fund: Sequoia has raised $7B to expand its AI bets
items.summaryShort: New leaders, new fund: Sequoia has raised $7B to expand its AI bets. The fundraise is the first major capital raise under Sequoia's new leadership, with Alfred Lin and Pat Grady now serving as co-stewards of the 54-year-old firm.

items.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
items.summaryShort: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises. The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

items.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
items.summaryShort: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project. The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.
